chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Applications No.1916 and 1914 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hg of bail applications 14.10.2024. Mr. Shaukat Ali Bhanbhro, advocate for the applicant. Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General. MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- Allegedly on water rotation, applicant armed with a shotgun present along with other accused fired upon Hasan hitting his leg on 30.07.2024. Applicant was arrested on 31.07.2024 and on 02.08.2024, on his pointation, the crime weapon was also recovered. Hence these FIRs. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that there is enmity between the parties; hence the applicant has falsely been implicated in this case. His arguments have been opposed by learned Additional Prosecutor General. Prima facie, evidence against the applicant in the shape of recovery of crime weapon and statements of witnesses under section 161 Cr. P.C. are available. In presence of such evidence against the applicant, who has been assigned a direct role through evidence, is not entitled to bail. Hence these bail applications are dismissed. However, the trial Court is directed to record the evidence of two material witnesses within two months after which applicant would have liberty to file an application for bail for a fresh consideration. JUDGE HANIF
